name: Naturalistic Neuroimaging Database (NNDb)
description: An OpenNeuro dataset (ds002837) of 86 participants who each watched one of 10 full-length feature films during fMRI, alongside high-resolution anatomical scans and NIH Toolbox measures. The full-narrative social content (characters, dialogue, intentions, emotions) makes it well suited to studying social cognition, theory of mind, and language in ecologically valid settings.
citation: Aliko S, Huang J, Gheorghiu F, Meliss S, Skipper JI (2020). A naturalistic neuroimaging database for understanding the brain using ecological stimuli. Scientific Data, 7, 347.

publications.title: A naturalistic neuroimaging database for understanding the brain using ecological stimuli
